We need to complete the function has_close_elements. The function should check if any two numbers in the list are closer than the threshold. That is, if there exists i != j such that abs(numbers[i] - numbers[j]) < threshold. The docstring says "closer to each other than given threshold." So we need to return True if any pair has absolute difference less than threshold, else False.

prompts.detail: tests passed
prompts.output_text_clip:
We need to complete the function below_zero. The function takes a list of integers representing operations (deposits positive, withdrawals negative). Starting balance zero. We need to check if at any point the balance falls below zero. If yes, return True; else False.

We need to implement it. The docstring includes examples. So we need to compute cumulative sum and check if any prefix sum < 0.

Implementation: iterate through operations, maintain balance, if balance < 0 return True, after loop

We are asked to complete the function filter_by_substring. The function signature and docstring are given. We need to implement it. The function should filter a list of strings, returning only those that contain the given substring.
